title: Good Sport
writer: William Hurlbut, Howard Lindsay, Bertrand Robinson

plot: When her husband (Alan Dinehart) sails for a three-month business trip in Europe, an unsophisticated wife ('Linda Watkins (I)') sublets a Manhattan apartment so she can occupy herself with shopping and the theater. While in the ap...
